title: oxalis duriuscula
intro: Oxalis duriuscula, also known as the sharp-leaved wood sorrel, is a perennial plant belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. This plant contains oxalic acid, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions and infections due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxalis duriuscula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Oxalis duriuscula is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used fresh in salads, although caution is advised due to its high oxalic acid content.
